backend.changelog: Fixes large assemblies that reported Done but generated nothing: the post-engage SolidWorks readiness recheck no longer times out and aborts the run while SolidWorks is still busy loading; it now retries briefly, and a blocked run no longer falsely shows Done.

cadBridge.changelog: Auto-dismisses the blocking SolidWorks 'What's Wrong' rebuild-error dialog during Generate so an assembly with a rebuild-errored component no longer stalls the run waiting for a manual Close. The dialog text is logged so you can see which component has errors (its outputs may be unreliable). Builds on 1.8.78 zombie-SolidWorks resilience.
